Bus Timings

F31 Bus Timetable The Meadows, Dubai British School to Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2)

March 13, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F31 offers a vital link between The Meadows area and Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2), serving various residential and commercial areas along the route. This bus route is designed to cater to the needs of both residents and commuters by providing a reliable and accessible means of transportation. It operates throughout the day, ensuring frequent service and connectivity to key locations in Dubai.

Route Name F31
Route Description The Meadows, Dubai British School - Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2)
Total Distance Approximately 9,5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 25 minutes
Operational Hours 04:28 to 23:50 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus F31 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The F31 bus operates with the following schedule:

From The Meadows, Dubai British School From Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2)

05:59 06:15

Bus F31 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or you can follow this link for F31 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for traveling on Bus F31 is AED 3. This cost-effective pricing ensures that passengers can travel comfortably between various points in Dubai without straining their budget. Additionally, it allows travelers to experience Dubai’s key areas without worrying about excessive costs.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus F31 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route without needing a prior reservation. For real-time updates and route information, passengers are encouraged to use local public transport resources or consult the RTA Dubai app, which provides up-to-date details on bus schedules and stops. The app helps in planning your journey and managing travel costs effectively.

Bus Route

The F31 bus route covers a comprehensive network, connecting important destinations within the city. The route includes:

  1. The Meadows, Dubai British School

  2. The Meadows, Town Centre

  3. The Springs, Entrance Gate 3

  4. The Meadows, Entrance Gate 7

  5. The Springs, Entrance Gate 4

  6. The Meadows, Entrance Gate 8

  7. The Springs, Entrance Gate 5

  8. Emirates Hills Turnoff

  9. Dubai International Academy

  10. Emirates Hills Turnoff

  11. Regent International School

  12. The Greens, Terminus

  13. The Greens, Al Sidir

  14. Mashael Building

  15. Minc Apartments

  16. Ramee Guestline Hotel Apartment

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Saleh Bin Lahej Building

  2. Mazoon Hotel & Apartments

  3. Mashael Building

  4. Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2)

Bus F31 Station Overview

The Meadows, Dubai British School

The Meadows, Dubai British School bus station is strategically located near the Dubai British School, catering primarily to the school community and local residents. This station offers essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and ticketing services, ensuring a comfortable and convenient transit experience for students, parents, and nearby residents. Its proximity to the school makes it an important stop for families and staff, facilitating easy access to educational and community activities within The Meadows area.

Al Barsha Heights, Ramee Guestline Hotel Apartment Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Barsha Heights, Ramee Guestline Hotel Apartment Bus Stop is a key intersection for Bus Routes 84, F31, and F35. Its location near the Ramee Guestline Hotel Apartment ensures easy access to local amenities and destinations.

Al Barsha Heights, Mazoon Hotel & Apartments Bus Stop Intersection

This strategic location provides seamless connections between these routes, facilitating convenient travel for residents, hotel guests, and commuters in the Al Barsha Heights area.

The intersection offers essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and real-time schedule updates, enhancing the overall travel experience and ensuring efficient transit across the city’s diverse destinations.

Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2)

Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2) bus station is situated adjacent to the DusitD2 hotel and within the Dubai Internet City area, a major business district.

It provides a critical link between the metro system and various business hubs in Dubai Internet City, making it a key transit point for professionals and visitors. The station’s location supports efficient travel to and from the area’s many offices, hotels, and commercial establishments.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The F31 bus route in Dubai covers several key areas that include notable destinations and attractions:

  1. Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2): Located near Dubai Internet City, this area is close to various technology and business hubs. While the direct bus stop may not be a tourist attraction, it’s a significant business district in Dubai.

2.

3.

  1. Regent International School: While primarily an educational institution, the vicinity around the school can offer insights into the local community and its facilities.

  2. Dubai International Academy: Similar to Regent International School, this location is notable for its educational contributions, but does not serve as a tourist destination.

  3. Mashael Building and Minc Apartments: These residential areas offer a glimpse into the local housing and living standards, contributing to the understanding of Dubai’s residential architecture.

  4. Ramee Guestline Hotel Apartment: Located along the route, this hotel offers accommodation options for visitors and travelers looking for a stay in a well-connected part of Dubai.

  5. Mazoon Hotel & Apartments: Another accommodation option, providing guests with a convenient stay near various residential and business districts.

Overall, while the F31 bus route primarily serves residential and business areas, it also passes through locations that can provide travelers with insights into Dubai’s community and accommodation options.

Journey Experience

Starting in the family-friendly, green community of The Meadows, known for its picturesque parks and tranquil lakes, the journey offers a glimpse into daily life in one of Dubai’s premier suburban areas.

As the bus moves closer to Dubai Internet City, passengers pass by modern tech parks and commercial centers, reflecting the city’s dynamic business environment. Along the way, you’ll witness Dubai’s famous skyline, as well as key landmarks like the bustling Dubai Marina and the scenic Emirates Golf Club.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2), the final stop on the F31 bus route, starting from The Meadows, Dubai British School, with a price range of AED 34-40. This fare range offers a convenient and cost-effective way to reach one of the key business and tech hubs in Dubai. Utilizing the app helps you manage and estimate your travel costs easily, ensuring a smooth journey to your destination.

In conclusion, Bus F31 offers crucial connectivity between The Meadows and Dubai Internet City Metro Landside (DusitD2), serving key residential and commercial areas. With frequent service and an affordable fare of AED 3, it’s a practical choice for both daily and occasional travel. The RTA Dubai app provides real-time updates, ensuring a smooth journey. Although online booking is not available, passengers can rely on the app for schedule management and travel information.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 13, 2026.
